claim: Independent verification confirms: gathered evidence is sufficient to support PRD readiness acceptance criteria. Explorer and cross-checker provided project-scoped evidence with concrete paths, no assumptions presented as facts, no unresolved missing data, and boundary audit enforcement is verified by both code and tests.

evidence.summary: Explorer and cross-checker independently confirmed buildBoundarySnapshot and diffBoundarySnapshots detect file mutations via digest maps.
evidence.why: Two independent agents verified same implementation with matching line numbers.

evidence.summary: Both agents verified runtime boundary enforcement: snapshot before agents, diff after, violations generate blockers.
evidence.why: Cross-check confirms exact logic flow without conflict.

evidence.summary: Explorer and cross-checker verified test confirms BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blocker prevents PRD readiness.
evidence.why: Test evidence independently verified by both agents.

evidence.summary: Both agents verified projectEvidenceBlockingIssues blocks readiness when project facts lack project-scoped evidence.
evidence.why: Cross-check confirmed enforcement prevents unverified claims.

evidence.summary: Explorer and cross-checker verified tests prove external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts.

risks: If provider adapter spawns full-tool agents that ignore tool profile restrictions, boundary audit could be bypassed at runtime despite policy declaration.
If evidence scope classification has edge cases where project-scoped sources are misclassified as external, valid evidence could be rejected.

result.why: Explorer and cross-checker provided consistent, independent verification of all claims with project-scoped evidence from code and tests. No conflicts, no assumptions presented as facts, no unresolved missing data. Acceptance criteria met: all agents cite project paths, boundary audit blocks mutations, PRD readiness requires valid evidence.
result.notes: Verifier confirms evidence agreement status is pass with zero conflicts. All 13 evidence records have project scope with concrete paths. 2 tests confirm enforcement. PRD readiness acceptance criteria satisfied.
